concept: Boulevard: Players customize lowrider cars in a garage, selecting various parts like hydraulics, wheels, and paint, then engage in rhythm-based "bouncing" challenges. Core gameplay involves tapping on-screen buttons in time with music to execute specific hydraulic moves, with scoring based on accuracy and combo streaks. Progression is achieved by earning in-game currency from successful performances, which unlocks new car models, advanced hydraulic systems, and cosmetic upgrades from the shop.
name: Lowriders Comeback: Boulevard
